title: Geetanjali Mehlwal joins IndiaLaw LLP as Senior Consultant
description: Geetanjali Mehlwal has joined IndiaLaw LLP as a Senior Consultant.Mehlwal is a 2002 alumna of Symbiosis Law School, Pune. She earned her LLM in Intellectual Property Rights, Commerce & Licensing from UNH Franklin Pierce School of Law. She also holds a Diploma in Information Technology Laws.A practicing lawyer before the Supreme Court of India and a distinguished legal consultant specialising in intellectual property, entertainment law, and new-age media advisory, Mehlwal brings a unique blen
